title: Can someone explain to me wtf Im seeing 333
display_title: Can someone explain to me wtf Im seeing 333
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Can someone explain to me wtf I'm seeing? (3.33             Quote Post by mastervampire » Thu May 09, 2013 4:26 am So I just watched 3.0 again and there are a few scenes where I have no idea what I'm looking at or what location they are in. It's a bit confusing so I've uploaded some scrrencaps of the scenes I would like clarifying. Can someone explain: 1. What are those pillar things around Shinji? They were also around Asuka and in a few other scenes in 2.0 SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Thu May 09, 2013 4:39 am 1. The 2.0 script calls them Angel-sealing Hex Pillars or something like that. 3. AT-field haxmagic, probably. The word "anti-gravity" also gets thrown around by the crew. 4. & 5. Yes. 6. That's the Rebuild equivalent of the dummy plug core. 7. The Black Moon's external wall. 8. That's the Moon. 9. Both. 10. The verdict is still missing on that one. 11. That's the ground that peeled apart during the finale of 2.0. This time, you're looking at it above. 12. Nerv HQ and it's being held up by a pillar. 14. That's Lilith's head. 15. Yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Thu May 09, 2013 4:53 am Trying my best to answer: 1. Angel sealing pillars. We've seen them @ the beginning of 2.22. (Acheron) Origins are unknown. 2. Wunders main engine that connects to Eva-01 (?) 3. They activated Eva-01(?) 4. Possibly. 5. Yup. 6. Maybe clone production area? 7. The reverted pyramid: Black moon(?) (See your pics: 4, 12) 8. The real moon/(Adams white moon?) that has 4 (Adams?) bloodstains. Those crosses are obviously just there because of 3rd impact. 9. Yes. 10. No idea. 11. The hole that opened when Eva-01 awakened in 2.22. 12. Part of Black moon that was risen from the ground below NERV HQ during 14 year time-skip? 13. 14. All heads from "Failures of infinity" (Red Eva-like beings) have fallen down to Lilith's chamber for some reason. 15. I'ts Lilith's (No idea why it's head turned into Rei's head) head that was severed by someone. (Rei II is still inside Eva-01 core) 16. - 17. Yes. Forgot to mention: Those symbols on top of the pillars we see @ pic 6 look quite similar to the symbol we see in 3.0 preview. (where Kaworu is standing with the "children of fate")

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Thu May 09, 2013 5:30 am Giji Shinka wrote: Rei II is still inside Eva-01 core

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Thu May 09, 2013 5:37 am Hmm....Well, Kozo stated that she was inside Eva-01.....And that would be the most logical place for her to be right now...

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Thu May 09, 2013 6:16 am Yui was stated to be in there; Rei, I'm not sure about. Another logical state of being for her is not being. That is, Ritsuko wasn't lying when she said Rei's not in Unit 01 for the simple reason that Rei ceased to exist altogether. She even said at the end of 2.0 that she cannot exist anywhere but in Zeruel.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Thu May 09, 2013 6:36 am amitakartok wrote: Yui was stated to be in there; Rei, I'm not sure about. Another logical state of being for her is not being. That is, Ritsuko wasn't lying when she said Rei's not in Unit 01 for the simple reason that Rei ceased to exist altogether. She even said at the end of 2.0 that she cannot exist anywhere but in Zeruel.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Thu May 09, 2013 9:14 am take a look in these: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13461/SPOILERS-Impact-Mechanics/?sid=188ee19c6954bb4f6e81767605074565 http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/13796/SPOILERS-Geofront-Moon-Stuff/?sid=188ee19c6954bb4f6e81767605074565

[]:             Quote Post by Lonecow12 » Thu May 09, 2013 9:39 am amitakartok wrote: That's just speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by Yokai » Fri May 10, 2013 3:07 pm To address #13: I don't think it's a particular room that they are in per-say, I'm pretty sure what was shown in the background was basically footage / recording. I'm pretty sure they were here: Fuyutsuki wanted to use the match as a means of getting him to go with him into this room and show Shinji his mother / a glimpse of his father's character. At least, that was my assumption.

[]:             Quote Post by K271 » Fri May 10, 2013 3:48 pm Some of the questions you have are basically the questions that are being discussed right now in the forum. I'm new in here so I was quite lost too, but trying to catch up in the topics of theories and speculations (:
